title: PixelBy: Tools
description: PixelBy: Tools is a resource pack that makes tools 3D mixing voxel and pixel art, initially based on Minecraft Movie tools.
body:
![PixelBy: Tools Spears Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a7785a0175b2a7a2b519e4840b213d433894d69.png)
#
![Header: ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/174ff9c47aa2485899292fc2172e82d51d15b226.png)

PixelBy: Tools is a Resource Pack that adds new 3D models for all main vanilla tools, initially based on the pickaxe [leaked](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/1f94xu9/the_new_update_of_the_minecraft_movie_the_poster/) image from the Minecraft movie, and then incorporating other ideas. 

The main goal of this resource pack is to ThreeDe-rize all items I consider tools in Minecraft, maintaining the Vanilla style, but with a touch of pixel art mixed with voxel art, check [changelogs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelby/changelog) to see images from the pack.


#

![Header: Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc469800d0df2023d6b9170047f22f700f053afe.png)

- This pack was created by Landrozaum, a SaltyLight team member.
- Credits to Mojang AB. because almost 90% of the colors used in the models in this pack are from Minecraft textures.

![Header: Legal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcbe66840d96bc3f31c368a307f1a4eb681a65b4.png)

This digital item is intended solely for personal use. Redistribution of this Digital Product, including uploading it to other platforms, is prohibited.

### You can:
- Record videos about this Resource Pack (please share with us in our discord server).
- Use this Resource Pack in your modpack.
- Use this pack as a subtle reference for your package (e.g.: Use images of the textures as reference, use colors as reference).

### You can not:
- Use models or textures from this pack as part of your resource pack, or data pack or mod (e.g.: Using a model just changing the colors, or making a model almost identical to a model from this pack).

#

![Pixel By Tools Release](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c611b8d528e4540283abc920d822c9a02053494.png)
